examples.sentence: The up and coming meeting is scheduled for next Tuesday afternoon.

examples.sentence: Are you attending the up and coming conference on renewable energy?

examples.sentence: Don't forget the up and coming deadline for the project submission is this Friday.

examples.sentence: Jessica is an up and coming artist who's gaining recognition in the local galleries.

examples.sentence: The up and coming tech startup attracted investors with its innovative solutions.

examples.sentence: Many up and coming athletes train hard every day to make it to the national team.

examples.sentence: Maria is considered an up-and-coming writer with several promising manuscripts in the works.

examples.sentence: The up-and-coming musician will probably headline next year's festival.
examples.translation: The likely-to-achieve-success musician will probably headline next year's festival.

examples.sentence: The up-and-coming neighborhood has seen rapid development over the last year.
examples.translation: The rapidly developing neighborhood has seen rapid development over the last year.

examples.sentence: Startups in the up-and-coming sectors are attracting significant venture capital.
examples.translation: Startups in the rapidly growing sectors are attracting significant venture capital.

examples.sentence: He is an up-and-coming leader within the organization, gaining influence quickly.
examples.translation: He is a rapidly becoming important leader within the organization, gaining influence quickly.

examples.sentence: She paced up and down the hallway while waiting for the phone to ring.
examples.translation: She paced from one end to the other of the hallway while waiting for the phone to ring.

examples.sentence: The children ran up and down the stairs several times during their playtime.

examples.sentence: Workers moved up and down the assembly line to check for defects.

examples.sentence: He walked up and down the beach looking for seashells to collect.
examples.translation: He walked along the full length of the beach looking for seashells to collect.

examples.sentence: I've been up and down the city all day trying to find that rare book.
examples.translation: I've been in many places all over the city all day trying to find that rare book.

examples.sentence: They traveled up and down the coast visiting various fishing villages.
examples.translation: They traveled repeatedly between places along the coast visiting various fishing villages.

examples.sentence: The delivery driver went up and down the street several times to complete all the orders.
examples.translation: The delivery driver went all over the street several times to complete all the orders.

examples.sentence: The flag kept fluttering up and down in the strong breeze all afternoon.
examples.translation: The flag kept moving repeatedly in an upward and downward motion in the strong breeze all afternoon.

examples.sentence: During the roller coaster ride, my stomach felt like it was going up and down nonstop.
examples.translation: During the roller coaster ride, my stomach felt like it was oscillating repeatedly up and down nonstop.

examples.sentence: The children jumped up and down on the trampoline with endless energy.
examples.translation: The children moved repeatedly up and down in jumping motion on the trampoline with endless energy.

examples.sentence: After hours of troubleshooting, the new software was finally up and running.

examples.sentence: The factory will be up and running again by next Monday after the maintenance work.
examples.translation: The factory will be fully operational again by next Monday after the maintenance work.

examples.sentence: Is the website up and running yet? Customers are eager to place orders.

examples.sentence: The community garden project is now up and running with volunteers every weekend.

examples.sentence: Once the new marketing campaign is up and running, sales should improve significantly.
examples.translation: Once the new marketing campaign has started, sales should improve significantly.

examples.sentence: The charity event is up and running, and people are already donating generously.
examples.translation: The charity event has started and is currently active, and people are already donating generously.

examples.sentence: When I asked for help, I realized I was completely up a tree with no way out.
examples.translation: When I asked for help, I realized I was in a difficult situation with no way out.

examples.sentence: She's really up a tree trying to solve that complicated legal issue without a lawyer.
examples.translation: She's really trapped in a difficult situation trying to solve that complicated legal issue without a lawyer.

examples.sentence: If the client rejects the proposal, we'll be up a tree and have to rethink our entire strategy.
examples.translation: If the client rejects the proposal, we'll be in a perplexing position and have to rethink our entire strategy.

examples.sentence: The cat was stuck up a tree after chasing a squirrel and couldn't come down.

examples.translation: Several birds were literally positioned in the branches of a tree, singing loudly in the morning light.

examples.sentence: We found the lost drone up a tree near the park after it crashed during the flight.

examples.sentence: Children climbed up a tree to get a better view of the fireworks display.
examples.translation: Children literally climbed into the branches of a tree to get a better view of the fireworks display.

examples.sentence: I'm definitely up for joining the hiking trip this weekend if the weather is good.
examples.translation: I am willing and eager to join the hiking trip this weekend if the weather is good.

examples.sentence: Are you up for trying that new sushi restaurant downtown tonight?
examples.translation: Are you willing and available to try that new sushi restaurant downtown tonight?

examples.sentence: They weren't up for participating in the debate competition due to lack of preparation.
examples.translation: They were not willing or eager to participate in the debate competition due to lack of preparation.

examples.translation: We will be willing and ready to take part in the charity run next month, so start training now!

examples.sentence: The new policy changes are up for a vote among the members next week.

examples.sentence: With no one applying yet, the scholarship is still up for grabs.

examples.sentence: The tickets to the concert went up for grabs as soon as they were released online.

examples.sentence: Don't wait too long; the opportunity is up for grabs until the end of the day.

examples.sentence: After the CEO resigned, the company’s leadership position was up for grabs.

examples.sentence: With the championship title up for grabs, every team is fighting hard to win.
examples.translation: With the championship title vulnerable to appropriation, every team is fighting hard to win.

examples.sentence: The vacant seat on the council is up for grabs and has attracted several candidates.

examples.sentence: After the breakup, Sarah was clearly up for grabs and ready to mingle again.
examples.translation: After the breakup, Sarah was romantically available and ready to mingle again.

examples.sentence: At the party, he was up for grabs, chatting with anyone who approached him.
examples.translation: At the party, he was sexually or romantically available, chatting with anyone who approached him.

examples.sentence: Since they just ended their relationship, both of them are up for grabs now.
examples.translation: Since they just ended their relationship, both of them are open to romantic or sexual availability now.

examples.sentence: The last spot on the team is still up for grabs, so keep practicing hard.

examples.sentence: With no clear favorite, the election is truly up for grabs among all candidates.

examples.sentence: Please park your car up front in the designated visitor spots.

examples.sentence: She sat up front in the classroom to get a better view of the board.

examples.sentence: Is the deposit paid up front or after the service is completed?

examples.sentence: Starting a business during a recession is often an uphill battle, but persistence pays off.

examples.sentence: Climbing the steep mountain was an uphill battle that tested their endurance.

examples.sentence: The soldiers faced an uphill battle as they advanced against the enemy on rough terrain.
examples.translation: The soldiers faced a difficult struggle requiring sustained effort against strong opposition on rough terrain.

examples.sentence: It was an uphill battle to move the heavy equipment up the slope without any mechanical help.
